title: Search Volume
description:
Axis-aligned bounding box that will be searched for valid placement positions. Expressed as offsets from the input position.

Properties:
• min (string[])
• [0..0] (int)
• [1..1] (int)
• [2..2] (int)
• max (string[])

min.title: Min
min.description: Minimum extent of the bounding volume expressed as [ x, y, z ]

max.title: Max
max.description: Maxium extent of the bounding volume expressed as [ x, y, z ]

defaultSnippets.label: Search Volume
defaultSnippets.description: Axis-aligned bounding box that will be searched for valid placement positions. Expressed as offsets from the input position.
